svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="vibe coding 代价" id="vibe-cost"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-102" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="300" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="vibe coding:能跑的 demo 被当成工业级软件" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="920" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="产品想法" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="110" x="50" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="vibe coding
跟 AI 聊" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="210" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="能跑的 demo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="390" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="🎉 上线
(看着像软件)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="570" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="真实代价
安全洞 / 维护不动
扩展不动 / 出事不知在哪" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="770" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="B"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="C"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="D" value="看着像"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="D" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#dc2626;dashed=1;" target="P"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
